Frankie SchultePhoto / image / motion
WorkAboutInquire
VOL. 01 /
SELECTED IMAGE ARCHIVE
◜───────────◝
WorkAboutInquire
Orange County Basedfrankiejschulte@gmail.com

About

I photograph what remains after the moment loses its name.

Hi, I’m Frankie. I make photographs of people, gatherings, performances, and the places I move through. I’m drawn to the point where an ordinary moment begins to feel unfamiliar—when light changes the body and the image becomes something more than evidence.

My approach is observant and collaborative. I give direction when it creates an opening, then step back when the moment begins to speak for itself. The goal is not to make everything perfect, but to leave enough space for something honest, strange, and impossible to repeat.

Available for portraits, graduations, events, concerts, editorial commissions, and select experiments in visual translation.

Start a conversation ↗

Orange County Based · Available to travel when the project makes sense.

FRANKIE SCHULTE / IMAGE ARCHIVESELECTED WORKS / 01—04
